name: Vibe Check
description_en: A product-management skill that guides a beginner from a raw idea to a validated, buildable plan.
description_zh: 一个产品管理技能,带新手从原始想法走到经过验证、可落地的方案。
long_en: Built by a long-time 0-to-1 product manager, this skill structures discovery, scoping, and validation so non-PMs can plan a product responsibly.
long_zh: 由资深 0→1 产品经理打造,这个技能把发现、范围界定与验证流程结构化,让非产品人也能稳妥地规划产品。
sec_note_zh: 纯文本指导;不访问系统。
